title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: **Findings** - `High` — Local policy load condition is contradictory. [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L12) and [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L14) say to always load local `AGENTS.md` / local `CODEX.md` if present, but [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L67) says local policy should be loaded only when task scope points to that project. This can cause accidental cross-project policy bleed. - `Medium` — Internal duplication in adapter SoT statement. [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L7) and [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L22) repeat the same canonical prompt source rule. Not functionally wrong, but it increases drift risk inside the adapter itself. - `Medium` — Adapter still carries substantial command behavior detail, creating prompt drift surface. [AGENTS.md](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md#L55) says detailed slash-command runtime procedures belong to canonical prompt files; [CODEX.md](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md#L48) still includes a long command behavior block. This is summary-level now, but still large enough to drift from `~/.codex/prompts/*`. No other material contradiction between these two files was found.
